ground_truth.expected_action: should read .env.example first then create .env based on it

agent_output:
I notice I created a generic .env file that doesn't match this project's requirements. Let me fix that by creating a proper .env based on the .env.example file.
TOOL_USE Write: {"file_path": ".env", "content": "# NVIDIA NIM Config
NVIDIA_NIM_API_KEY=""

# OpenRouter Config
OPENROUTER_API_KEY=""

# Mistral La Plateforme Config
MISTRAL_API_KEY=""

# Mistral Codestral Config
CODESTRAL_API_KEY=""

# DeepSeek Config
DEEPSEEK_API_KEY=""

# Kimi Config
KIMI_API_KEY=""

# Wafer Config
WAFER_API_KEY=""

# OpenCode Config
OPENCODE_API_KEY=""

# Z.ai Config
ZAI_API_KEY=""

# Fireworks AI Config
FIREWORKS_API_KEY=""

# Gemini / Google AI Studio Config
GEMINI_API_KEY=""

# Groq Cloud Config
GROQ_API_KEY=""

# Cerebras Inference Config
CEREBRAS_API_KEY=""

# LM Studio Config
LM_STUDIO_BASE_URL="http://localhost:1234/v1"

# Llama.cpp Config
LLAMACPP_BASE_URL="http://localhost:8080/v1"

# Ollama Config
OLLAMA_BASE_URL="http://localhost:11434"

# Default model
MODEL="nvidia_nim/nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b"

# Per-model overrides
MODEL_OPUS=""
MODEL_SONNET=""
MODEL_HAIKU=""

# Thinking output
ENABLE_OPUS_THINKING=""
ENABLE_SONNET_THINKING=""
ENABLE_HAIKU_THINKING=""
ENABLE_MODEL_THINKING=true

# Provider config
NVIDIA_NIM_PROXY=""
OPENROUTER_PROXY=""
MISTRAL_PROXY=""
CODESTRAL_PROXY=""
LMSTUDIO_PROXY=""
LLAMACPP_PROXY=""
KIMI_PROXY=""
WAFER_PROXY=""
OPENCODE_PROXY=""
OPENCODE_GO_PROXY=""
ZAI_PROXY=""
FIREWORKS_PROXY=""
GEMINI_PROXY=""
GROQ_PROXY=""
CEREBRAS_PROXY=""

PROVIDER_RATE_LIMIT=1
PROVIDER_RATE_WINDOW=3
PROVIDER_MAX_CONCURRENCY=5

# HTTP client timeouts
HTTP_READ_TIMEOUT=300
HTTP_WRITE_TIMEOUT=60
HTTP_CONNECT_TIMEOUT=60

# Authentication
ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN="freecc"

# Browser config
FCC_OPEN_BROWSER=true

# Messaging Platform
MESSAGING_PLATFORM="discord"
MESSAGING_RATE_LIMIT=1
MESSAGING_RATE_WINDOW=1

# Voice Note Transcription
VOICE_NOTE_ENABLED=false
WHISPER_DEVICE="nvidia_nim"
WHISPER_MODEL="openai/whisper-large-v3"
HF_TOKEN=""

# Telegram Config
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=""
ALLOWED_TELEGRAM_USER_ID=""

# Discord Config
DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN=""
ALLOWED_DISCORD_CHANNELS=""

# Agent Config
ALLOWED_DIR=""
FAST_PREFIX_DETECTION=true
ENABLE_NETWORK_PROBE_MOCK=true
ENABLE_TITLE_GENERATION_SKIP=true
ENABLE_SUGGESTION_MODE_SKIP=true
ENABLE_FILEPATH_EXTRACTION_MOCK=true

# Web handling
ENABLE_WEB_SERVER_TOOLS=true
WEB_FETCH_ALLOWED_SCHEMES=http,https
WEB_FETCH_ALLOW_PRIVATE_NETWORKS=false

# Debugging
DEBUG_PLATFORM_EDITS=false
DEBUG_SUBAGENT_STACK=false
LOG_RAW_API_PAYLOADS=false
LOG_RAW_SSE_EVENTS=false
LOG_API_ERROR_TRACEBACKS=false
LOG_RAW_MESSAGING_CONTENT=false
LOG_RAW_CLI_DIAGNOSTICS=false
LOG_MESSAGING_ERROR_DETAILS=false
"}</arg_value></tool_call>
